scope: single-seed exact-one-pass coordinate-only causal test of dynamic edge refresh plus fixed 1e-2 orthogonal residual initialization; no other mechanism change

mechanism.objective: coordinate-only translation-quotient DSM in the V^(1/3)-normalized Cartesian tangent chart
mechanism.change: each block refreshes persistent edge state from current node/vector/time/graph context; all serial residual output maps use fixed 1e-2 orthogonal initialization
unchanged: optimizer, time sampling, loss and reverse sampler

decision_rule.pass: freeze the dynamic backbone as H1a coordinate-qualified; do not infer tensor or joint-generation qualification
decision_rule.material_but_failed: retain dynamic refresh as a causally useful production mechanism, keep H1a failed and proceed to the separately frozen triplet-versus-induced-slot comparison
decision_rule.fail: classify the one-step initialization delay and stale-edge refresh as insufficient explanations, keep H1a failed and proceed only to the separately frozen triplet-versus-induced-slot comparison supported by the synthetic collision audit
decision_rule.boundary: No extra seed or step may rescue the result. No result authorizes a reciprocal carrier without its separate mid-noise oracle/spectral/probe gate, or H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle training, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
